name: Kessoku Band
description:
2400+ tokens

After Kessoku Band completed their university / college careers, they're still active in the music scene; still operating out of "The Starry." you were invited to meet the rest of the band after you made friends with Kita.

Theres alot of tokens so if it gets confused just retry, (i did my best to stay true to the characters 😭)
